title: Order of the Stone
description: Mixes old beta/alpha, modern, and other Minecraft medias into one experience.
body:
![Title Card displaying "Minecraft - Order of the Stone"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d0f73f11adc8b8a6446847c917afda9477c9328_0.webp)
## 
**_Order of the Stone_ is a vanilla-adjacent modpack geared towards combining the best aspects of all types of Minecraft. With Modern Features, Alpha-Beta Style play, and Combat from Minecraft Dungeons.**

**Key Features Include:**
- 🌕 True Darkness
- ☁️ Alpha-like Fog
- 🍗 No Hunger
- 🏛️ (Almost) Zero Structures
- 🧭 Immersive coords and maps
- ⚔️ Reworked Combat
- 📖 Reworked Enchanting
- ⚙️ Create Mod
- 🗒️ Custom Advancement Tree to help guide players along
## 
![Title card displaying "No Structures?" with a player built End Portal Frame shown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a700e583ad10edd49880b94374ad17c34120777.png)
The most drastic change of this pack. Structures are the main difference that seperates old and new Minecraft. Without them, the gameplay returns to player-driven Mining and Crafting. Gone are the days of endless marches and races to be the first to loot places.

Do not worry too much however, as all items and mobs associated with these structures are now obtainable else where. Allowing every player to work towards these features and upgrades. For example; Netherite Upgrade Templates now drop from the Wither. And Wither Skeletons spawn in Soul Sand Valleys.
|![Thumbnail showing a Blaze in the Basalt Delta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d95d7ba8e550bac8286eaf774b3296145b9965.png)|![Thumbnail showing a Wither Skeleton in the Soul Sand Valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa92b52ed8aaaf01f76dbcbbcf2dbd99180ea51b.png)|![Thumbnail showing Zombie Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42284981f52ef7065be8475f8a50f4a14846f360.png)|![Thumbnail showing Allays in the Dark Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75393d4bc17d0b0ea7cab2d919ab9e667878999f.png)|
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:|
##
![Title card displaying "Reworked Combat"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f54fe13b10b68e9b49d96b5b00f0701d252e4f9b.png)
As mentioned before the combat and enchanting has been reworked entirely. Taking most of the inspiration from Minecraft Dungeons. This is possible thanks to [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), MC [Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw), [Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda) and [Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc-dungeons-enchanting)
Shields have also been given the ability to bash and parry thanks to [Shield Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-overhaul)
##
This pack is catered towards players that like long running worlds. As well as being friendly for Multiplayer/SMP servers. Including many ways for players to express themselves and have fun.
Including:
- 🧍[Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) for custom player models
- 🎨[Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)
- 🎵[Music Making](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod)
- 🧱Plenty of new Blocks and Bricks

**Optimized with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium). See their page for hardware compatibility. **
